file.content:
# Plan: Remove footer from plans page

## Task Description
Remove the `<footer>` element from the `plans` variant merch card render layout. The footer currently contains the secure transaction label and the CTA slot (`slot name="footer"`). The goal is to fully delete the footer markup from the rendered output — not hide it with CSS. Dead CSS targeting the footer should also be removed. The scope is limited to the `plans` variant (including `plans-education`, `plans-students`); the `plans-v2` variant is a separate class and must not be touched unless explicitly scoped.

## Relevant Files

- `web-components/src/variants/plans.js` — **edit**: remove `${this.secureLabelFooter}` from `renderLayout()`; remove footer-specific CSS from `variantStyle`; audit `adjustSlotPlacement` for null-safety now that `footer` will be absent from the shadow DOM
- `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` — **edit**: remove any global CSS rules that target `merch-card[variant^="plans"] footer` (if any exist)
- `web-components/src/variants/variant-layout.js` — **read-only**: understand `secureLabelFooter` and `secureLabel` base implementations (no changes needed here)

## Step by Step Tasks

### 1. Remove `secureLabelFooter` from `Plans.renderLayout()`
- In `web-components/src/variants/plans.js`, locate `renderLayout()` (line ~329)
- Delete the `${this.secureLabelFooter}` template expression from the returned html template literal
- The `<slot></slot>` default slot after it must remain in place

### 2. Remove footer-specific CSS from `Plans.variantStyle`
- In the same file, locate `static variantStyle = css\`...\``
- Remove the rule block `:host([variant^='plans']) footer { ... }` (lines ~441–444)
- Remove the rule block `:host([variant^='plans']) footer ::slotted([slot='addon']) { ... }` (lines ~417–420)
- Remove the rule block `:host([variant='plans']) .wide-footer #stock-checkbox { ... }` (lines ~422–424) — only needed when footer is present
- Keep all other CSS rules untouched

### 3. Audit `adjustSlotPlacement` for footer-null safety
- In `adjustSlotPlacement()` (line ~87), `shadowRoot.querySelector('footer')` will now return `null`
- All existing accesses already use optional chaining (`footer?.classList`), so no runtime error will occur
- Verify no path performs a non-optional access on `footer` — if found, add `?.` guard

### 4. Check `plans.css.js` for global footer rules
- Scan `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` for any rules targeting `footer` within plans variants
- If found, remove those rules

### 5. Validate syntax
- Run `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.js`
- Run `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`

## Acceptance Criteria
- The `Plans.renderLayout()` no longer emits a `<footer>` element
- No `display:none` or visibility tricks are used — the footer markup is absent from the DOM
- CSS rules that exclusively targeted the now-removed footer are deleted
- `plans-v2.js` is unchanged
- `variant-layout.js` is unchanged
- `node --check` passes on all modified files
- Other variant pages (segment, product, catalog, etc.) are unaffected

## Validation Commands
- `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.js`
- `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`

tool_input.command: git diff main -- web-components/src/variants/plans.js web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js 2>/dev/null | head -100
tool_input.description: Check if any implementation changes exist in the plans files

Find secureLabelFooter and footer in variant-layout.js

tool_input.command: node --check /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7a36499d/web-components/src/variants/plans.js && echo "plans.js OK" && node --check /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7a36499d/web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js && echo "plans.css.js OK"

git add web-components/src/variants/plans.js web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(plans): remove footer element from plans page variants

Remove secureLabelFooter from Plans.renderLayout() and delete all
CSS rules that exclusively targeted the now-absent footer element.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
tool_input.description: Stage and commit the plans footer removal

tool_response.stdout:
[feat-12-remove-footer-from-plans-page 5113a7b] feat(plans): remove footer element from plans page variants
 2 files changed, 2 insertions(+), 26 deletions(-)

tool_input.command:
gh pr create \
  --title "feat(plans): remove footer from plans page" \
  --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Removed `${this.secureLabelFooter}` from `Plans.renderLayout()` — the `<footer>` element (containing the secure transaction label and CTA slot) is no longer emitted in the shadow DOM
- Deleted three CSS rules in `plans.js` that exclusively targeted the now-absent `<footer>` element
- Deleted two CSS rules in `plans.css.js` targeting `[slot="footer"]` within plans variants (dead CSS after footer removal)

## Issue
Closes #12

## Test plan
- [ ] Plans page renders without a footer element in the shadow DOM
- [ ] No `display:none` or visibility tricks used — footer markup is absent
- [ ] `plans-v2.js` and `variant-layout.js` are unchanged
- [ ] Other variant pages (segment, product, catalog) are unaffected
- [ ] `node --check` passes on both modified files
EOF
)" \
  --base main
